A throwaway `tmp_verify_existing_shots.mjs` script then asserted full-match inclusion, partial-match rejection, and created-shot dedup; it printed `verification ok` and was deleted immediately after.

sense_check_acknowledgments.executor_note: Yes. All three requested vitest scopes passed: video-editor, SelectionContextMenu, and gallery. The throwaway verification script also passed and confirmed the three required semantics: full-match shots appear, partial overlaps do not, and a created shot is filtered out of `visibleExistingShots` while its inline created-shot actions are showing.
